creator: leres@freebsd.org
text:
Created attachment 253645
patch

Here's a patch that implements the suggestion by Edward.Sanford.Sutton, III in https://bugs.freebsd.org/bugzilla//show_bug.cgi?id=280674#c13 to remove the problematic line from the the patch when it is downloaded. (Which I guess is some kind of bitbucket.org version number?)
